task:
<environment>
Base URL: http://localhost:5173?file=demo
Browser is headless: yes
Uses existing browser cookies: no
Scope: Changes
Current branch: main
Main branch: main
</environment>

<developer_request>
Test links, images, and special content in the editor on http://localhost:5173?file=demo. 1) Insert a link via the bubble menu — verify it's clickable and opens correctly. Try editing an existing link. Try removing a link. 2) Try pasting a URL directly — does it auto-link? 3) Try inserting an image via slash command or paste — what happens? 4) Type a mermaid code block (triple-backtick mermaid) with a simple flowchart — does it render as a diagram? 5) Type HTML entities like & < > " — are they handled correctly? 6) Type emoji and special unicode characters — verify they survive save/load roundtrip via source toggle. 7) Create a very wide table (10+ columns) — does it overflow or scroll properly? 8) Try to create a footnote [^1] — does the editor support it or break? Report EVERY bug and unexpected behavior.
</developer_request>

<scope_strategy>
- Treat committed and uncommitted work as one body of change.
- Cover the requested flow first, then the highest-risk adjacent flows.
- Test 2-4 follow-up flows, prioritizing paths that share components or data with the changed files.
- If the changes touch shared utilities or layouts, verify multiple pages that use them.
</scope_strategy>
